case_title: DA SILVA, OLSON VS ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DA SILVA, OLSON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (DEFENDANT APPEARED) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO OLSON DA SILVA RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-10-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-08-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CASE CONTINUED BY AGREEMENT OF PARTIES TO EXPLORE SETTLEMENT; IF PARTIES DON'T APPEAR, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
